_doc: QUAKE LEGACY LoRA manifest. All SDXL. All HuggingFace — no auth required.

photoreal_boost.prompt_prefix: photorealistic, ultra detailed, physically based rendering, 8k,
photoreal_boost.description: Pushes SDXL output toward photorealism. Subtle at 0.5, strong at 0.8.

extremely_detailed.prompt_prefix: extremely detailed, sharp focus, micro detail, fine texture,
extremely_detailed.description: Detail slider — face pores, skin texture, surface micro-detail. Strength -3 to +3.
extremely_detailed.notes: Use at 1.0–2.0 for face textures. Stack with photoreal_boost for maximum skin realism.

cel_shade.trigger: neon cel shading, cel shaded, neon realism,
cel_shade.prompt_prefix: cel shading, neon realism, bold outlines, vibrant colors, game art,
cel_shade.description: Neonify SDXL v2.3 — cel shading + neon realism. Great for mapobjects and player models.
cel_shade.notes: Start at strength=0.5, go to 0.8 for strong cartoon. 1.8GB — loaded on demand.

retro_quake.trigger: quake retro, id software style, 90s fps,
retro_quake.prompt_prefix: quake retro aesthetic, id software, 90s fps game, grungy metal, dark industrial,
retro_quake.description: Custom LoRA — needs training on pak00 corpus. ~2000 image pairs on pak00 originals.

painterly.hf_repo: search:huggingface.co painterly oil painting SDXL LoRA
painterly.prompt_prefix: oil painting, brush strokes, painterly, textured canvas,
painterly.description: Painterly / oil painting style. Good for mapobjects and wall textures.

anime.prompt_prefix: anime style, manga, clean line art, vibrant, flat cel shading,
anime.description: Anime/manga conversion. Fun for player skins.

download_instructions.method: All downloads from HuggingFace — no auth required
download_instructions.restart_required: Restart ComfyUI after adding new LoRA files
